name: Rogz Dog Grinz Treat Ball 4.9cm - Red Small
shortDescription: Rogz Dog Grinz Treat Ball (Red, 4.9cm) – safe, durable, and interactive toy for small dogs. Treat-dispensing, floats on water, and ideal for active play.
description: The Rogz Dog Grinz Treat Ball is a playful and durable toy designed for small dogs and puppies. This compact, 4.9cm ball offers mental stimulation, physical exercise, and safe chewing. Its clever toothy grin design adds a touch of humor while your dog enjoys hours of fun, both on land and in water. Key Features Perfect for Small Breeds: 4.9cm diameter ideal for puppies and small dogs. Safe & Durable Material: Made from soft yet resilient SEBS thermoplastic rubber, gentle on teeth but strong enough for energetic play. Treat-Dispensing Fun: Fill the internal cavity with your dog’s favorite treats; they are gradually released as your dog plays, keeping them engaged. Floats on Water: Lightweight and buoyant, perfect for water games or beach outings. Playful Design: Tooth-patterned ball creates a fun “smiling dog” effect during play. Easy Care: Simple to stuff with treats and clean for regular use. Benefits Promotes Healthy Chewing: Supports gum health and strengthens the jaw. Encourages Activity: Keeps dogs entertained, helping prevent boredom and destructive behavior. Versatile Play Options: Suitable for fetch, chew, or water games, ensuring year-round enjoyment.
